expected: Schedule toolbar controls must either perform real navigation/actions or not be exposed as enabled fake controls.
Baseline opens the existing project baseline route.
Unsupported filter/column toolbar controls are not rendered as clickable fake actions.
actualBefore: Baseline used demoAction("снимок baseline") and did not navigate.
Фильтры used demoAction("фильтры") with no implemented filter panel.
Колонки used demoAction("настройка колонок") with no implemented column settings flow.
fixApplied: Converted Baseline to a real Next Link: /projects/${projectId}/baseline.
Removed unsupported Фильтры and Колонки toolbar buttons from the schedule UI.
Added a project-action-links static contract test for the schedule toolbar.
redEvidence: ./node_modules/.bin/vitest.cmd run apps/web/src/delivery/project-action-links.test.ts -> 4 tests, 1 failed before implementation; new schedule contract could not find the baseline Link.
greenEvidence: Spot check: apps/web/src/delivery/schedule/schedule-surface.tsx line 760 renders <Link href={`/projects/${projectId}/baseline`}>Baseline</Link> and no longer contains the schedule demoAction calls.
limitations: This is targeted source/test/typecheck evidence for the historical BUG-PROJ-09 schedule fake-controls scope.
Full browser traversal for every role, route, and action remains tracked separately as RISK-FULL-BROWSER-TRAVERSAL.
regressionRisk: Low. The change removes unsupported fake toolbar controls and maps Baseline to an existing route; no scheduling data mutation behavior changes.
